title: Watering Arabadopsis in the Greenhouse or Growth Chamber
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7ifep","text":"Watering Arabadopsis in the greenhouse or growth chamber.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ecoue","text":"Do not go in growth chamber if you have been in the field or greenhouse without changing your clothes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fill tray with about one inch of water.
Wait 15 minutes. If soil has absorbed all the water in the tray, add another inch of water.
Repeat steps 2 and 3 until after 15 minutes there is still standing water in the tray. Dump out any remaining water.

Water approximately every three days. Watering frequency will vary based on soil type, size of plants, quantity of plants per tray, temperature and humidity of growth chamber or greenhouse. Adjust as needed.
creator: Lynn Doran
